120363407122736550@g.us.text: Here we go for paid invoice!
16-5, Seongmisan-ro 23-gil, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea

you can find all of info about our neighborhood  here!
(please sign up Naver and install Naver map !!!)

🏠 *FISH 09 Guest Manual*

📌 Essential Information

📍 Address
 

서울 마포구 성미산로23길 16-5
 16-5,
 Seongmisan-ro 23-gil, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea

🔑 Your Suite Door Code
 

Check-in date in the format YYMMDD + *
 Example: 10 May 2025 → 250510* (remains the same throughout your stay)

📶 Wi-Fi
 

SSID: KT-GiGA_C34B
 
PIN: eck93gg798

🚗 Parking (Important)
 

We don’t have a private lot, but many guests park along the curb right beside the building.
 (Technically it isn’t legal, but enforcement is rare.)

✅ Tip: If you plan to park on the curb (street-side), please message our team in advance — we’ll do our best to check the latest local parking situation for you.

🅿️ Nearest official option (3-minute walk):

 Yeonnam-dong Public Parking Lot 

📍
 Map → https://naver.me/x0UvYEAj
 

Address: 361-9 Yeonnam-dong, Mapo-gu, Seoul
 

Rate: ₩300 per 5 minutes (no all-day pass)
 Discount: 50% off for multi-child families & eco-friendly vehicles

📱 Guest Smartphone Provided

A free smartphone with a Korean number and unlimited data & calls is available on the living room table.
 All essential apps are pre-installed, and it can be used as a portable Wi-Fi hotspot.

💡 Local Tip: Open Naver Map → Bookmarks 

— we saved a local guide with
 hidden gem restaurants 🍜 supermarkets & convenience stores 🏪 hospitals & clinics 🏥 ATMs & banks 💳 and more 📍😉

🍽️ Food Delivery Made Easy

Use the guest smartphone to open Coupang Eats, create your cart, then send us a screenshot of your final order via Messenger.
 We’ll place the order using our card — you can pay us in cash (or crypto) at checkout.

🚐 Need an MPV Van Taxi?

Let us know anytime — we can help arrange a spacious ride using local peer-to-peer transport options.

🍳 Kitchen Appliances

A full kitchen is ready for you, including a dishwasher, oven, and water purifier.
 Feel free to cook like home! 🥘✨

💧 Water Purifier (EVERPURE)
Brand: EVERPURE (USA) — Starbucks official partner
 Type: Direct-flow purified water system
 Maintenance: Professionally serviced monthly
 How to use: Use the small faucet on the left side of the sink labeled “정수기 / Purified Water”
 Benefit: Safe, great-tasting water for drinking & cooking

☕ Capsule Coffee & Tea

Extra tea & coffee capsules are in the drawer under the induction range ☕✨

illy Coffee Machine Guides
 

Quick Start: https://youtu.be/XEDAXZY50FM?si=uOfwquZXC6WCis_G
 

Steam Milk: https://youtu.be/bTzG7iM4dMA?si=aiEWUseiOT0as-Jo
 

Volume Settings: https://youtu.be/h2X5gLYpf_4?si=eaDtARcyGQTjddFz

♻️ Food Waste Disposal

Turn on the sink water and press the foot pedal to use the disposer.

🗑️ General & Recyclable Waste

Please separate trash into the bins in the kitchen.
 Extra trash bags are in the shoe cabinet — replace bags when full.

When bags are full, leave them outside and message us.
 Korea’s trash rules can be tricky, so feel free to ask anytime 💛

📽️ Multimedia Setup

Use the projector connected to Korean TV & Google TV.

Steps

Turn on the projector

Turn on the Yamaha soundbar

Use the soundbar remote to choose input (TV or Google TV)


🧴 Amenities & Towels

About 20 towel sets (face/body/foot) are in the bathroom.
 Toilet paper: last compartment of the shoe cabinet
 Hotel-style amenities: cabinet beside the induction stove

🔒 Privacy

Reflective window film protects your privacy during the day.
 At night, please close the blinds to stay fully private.

❄️ Heating & Ventilation (Winter)

🔥 Please don’t touch the living room heating panel (it controls the whole home + hot water).

🌡️ Bedroom radiators: keep ON 24/7 and set to 23°C.

🌬️ Ventilation (HRV) x2: keep ON (LOW setting) at all times to keep air fresh & prevent condensation.

🧊 Feeling warm? Open a window for a few minutes.

💬 Need help? Message us anytime!

🚭 Smoking

Smoking is allowed on the terrace only. Please use the ashtray 🙏

💬 Need Anything?

Message us anytime on WhatsApp, KakaoTalk, or LINE — we reply quickly and are always happy to help 💛

All you need · All-in-one · All for you. — COZE Hospitality 3.0 ✨

🚐📚 The Complete Guidebook about Airport Vans!

1️⃣ Reservation Method

Tell us your travel date , arrival time , airline , and flight number
After confirmation, we’ll send detailed pickup instructions & driver contact.

2️⃣ Van Service Rates & Promotions

🎁 Promotions

4-night stay → 1 × 7-seater van FREE 
6-night stay → 2 × 7-seater vans FREE 

💰 Extra Rates

Gimpo Airport ↔ Accommodation — 🚗 4-seater ₩70 000 / 🚐 7-seater ₩90 000

Incheon Airport ↔ Accommodation — 🚗 4-seater ₩100 000 / 🚐 7-seater ₩120 000

Seoul city luggage transport — 🚗/🚐 flat ₩60 000


🛋️ Comfort Tip

Seven people plus luggage can feel tight in a 7-seater. For more space, book two 4-seaters. 😌


3️⃣ Meeting Your Driver

Your driver tracks your flight and waits at the arrival gate with a name sign.

⏳ Wait time up to 60 minutes after landing.

🤝 Once you meet, head straight to the vehicle.

💡 Tips required

Currency exchange or SIM?  The driver introduce you to find /  ₩10 000 

Early & Late Work Time (21PM-06AM) /  ₩20 000

 Baby Car Seat  / ₩20 000 per seat

Move between termina /l ₩30 000 


We look forward to welcoming you soon! 🌷

Warm regards,
Gaya, Guest Care Team

line:C6f044afb7b003ca5b2913316884c6986.text: 請問民宿插座有轉接頭嗎

您好 😊✨
 

关于 110V 插头转换器 / 电压转换器，这里是详细说明：
 • 每间卧室都配有万能插排 🧩
🔌
 每个房间都准备了多国通用的电源插排，大多数旅客的充电器都可以直接使用。


 • 需要“降压变压器”吗？⚡️
 
大多数情况下不需要。以下这些现代电子产品通常是宽电压（100–240V），在韩国只要插头形状能匹配即可正常使用：

手机充电器

笔记本电脑充电器

相机 / 充电宝充电器

平板电脑充电器


 ✅ 小提示：请查看适配器标签，如果写着 “Input: 100–240V”，就不需要电压转换器。


 • 重要：我们不提供降压变压器
 由于大多数设备都不需要，我们家里不常备电压转换器。

 • 什么时候可能需要（很少见）
 如果您携带的是功率较大、带电机/加热的设备，且仅支持 110V，可能才需要转换器，例如：

吹风机 / 卷发棒 / 直发器（部分型号）

电动剃须刀（较旧型号）

旅行熨斗

非宽电压的 CPAP 呼吸机
 如不确定，请告诉我们设备名称，并拍一张电源标签（写有电压信息的那一面）发给我们，我们会准确告诉您需要准备什么 🙏✨


 Gaya｜COZE Hospitality 3.0 客服团队

降壓變壓器 不需要
主要是手機充電
房間有萬國通用插排應該就可以了

🚗 주차 안내

환풍기 회색 전원을 우측 콘센트에 꽂으면 작동합니다.

일회용 그릴 꼭 사용 (위생·청결 유지)
BBQ 이용료: 30,000원


🪟 사계절 BBQ OK!


여름: 모기 기피제 비치 🦟
겨울: 파티오 히터 4대 + 2층 마스터룸 야외 담요
히터는 휴대용 프로판 가스 사용, 미사용 시 반드시 전원 OFF

📱 게스트 전용 스마트폰

한국 번호와 무제한 데이터·통화가 제공되는 스마트폰이 숙박 기간 동안 무료로 제공됩니다! 

필수 앱이 모두 설치되어 있으며, 휴대용 Wi-Fi 핫스팟으로도 사용할 수 있습니다.

사용 예시 🍽️ 배달 주문 🚕 택시 호출 🌐 인터넷 검색 🗺️ 주변 탐색

현지 맛집 🍜
슈퍼·편의점 🏪
병원·클리닉 🏥
ATM·은행 💳 필요한 모든 정보를 손안의 가이드처럼 활용하세요! 📍😉

🍽️ 음식 배달 간편 주문

스마트폰에서 Coupang Eats 앱 실행
장바구니 담기 완료 후 스크린샷 촬영
WhatsApp으로 저희에게 전송
저희 카드로 결제·주문해 드리며, 체크아웃 시 현금(또는 암호화폐)으로 정산하시면 됩니다!

🚐 MPV 밴 택시가 필요하신가요?

메시지로 알려주시면 현지 모빌리티 앱으로 넓은 밴 택시를 예약해 드립니다.

식기세척기, 오븐, 정수기 구비

브랜드: EVERPURE(미국) — 스타벅스 공식 파트너

타입: 직수형 정수 시스템

관리: 매월 전문 관리

사용법: 싱크대 왼편 ‘정수기/Purified Water’ 라벨이 있는 작은 파우셋 사용

특징: 음용·조리에 적합한, 매우 안전하고 맛있는 물

집처럼 편하게 조리하세요!

싱크대 내장 디스포저 사용
물을 틀고
발판을 밟아 작동

📺 TV & 스트리밍

Google TV 선택 후 Netflix, Disney+, YouTube 등 다양한 서비스를 이용하세요.

🧻 비품

여분 화장지는 식탁 옆 옷장에 있습니다.

🧴 타월

세탁실
마스터룸 옷장

2층으로 올라가는 계단 아래 옷장에 풀 사이즈 어메니티 박스가 있습니다. 자유롭게 사용하세요!


💬 문의 & 도움

Hello, we are interested in these tours. Would you be able to make us an itinerary for each tour. Nothing too strenuous activity because we have an 80yr old with us. She can walk but might tire easily.
Would you be able to make us an itinerary for each tour. Nothing too strenuous activity because we have an 80yr old with us. from @32040573472770

We would be delighted to prepare a private itinerary for your group 

As you will be traveling with an 80-year-old family member, we have designed each day to be comfortable and unhurried, with:

✨ Shorter walking sections rather than long continuous walks
✨ Regular seated breaks at cafés and restaurants
✨ Vehicle drop-offs as close as reasonably possible
✨ Minimal hills and stairways
✨ Flexible timing according to your family member’s energy level
✨ A complimentary wheelchair available with advance notice

The schedules below are planned as 10-hour private tours, but your COZE host can shorten, extend, or rearrange individual stops during the day whenever the group needs additional rest.

🏯 Monday, September 28

Palace & Heritage Seoul

9:00 AM — Hotel pickup
9:30 AM — Gyeongbokgung Palace, focusing on the main highlights and easiest walking route
11:45 AM — Local lunch, with three suggested options:

• Baeknyeon Tojong Samgyetang — traditional ginseng chicken soup
• Maji — Korean temple cuisine with vegan options
• A trusted local restaurant specializing in saengtae maeuntang, a spicy fresh pollock stew

1:30 PM — Gentle Bukchon and Blue House scenic route
3:00 PM — Gilsangsa Temple, following the shorter and less strenuous section
4:00 PM — Traditional hanok tea-house experience in Seongbuk-dong
6:00 PM — N Seoul Tower for sunset and panoramic city views
Around 7:00 PM — Return to the hotel

✨ Tuesday, September 29

Seongsu Uptrend & Modern Seoul

10:00 AM — Hotel pickup
10:30 AM — Amore Seongsu K-beauty flagship experience
11:30 AM — Dior Seongsu and Café Dior, subject to access and reservation availability
12:30 PM — Lunch in Seongsu, with three recommended choices:

• Mealbon — comforting Korean noodles and rice dishes
• Daesung Galbi — traditional charcoal-grilled pork ribs
• Nanpo — stylish contemporary Korean cuisine

2:00 PM — Gentle Monster flagship and creative installations
3:30 PM — COEX Starfield Library and indoor shopping break
5:30 PM — Relaxed Han River sunset stop
8:00 PM — Return to the hotel

🌳 Wednesday, September 30

Nami Island, Rail Bike & Forest Healing

8:00 AM — Hotel pickup
9:30 AM — Nami Island, following a shorter, flatter route with frequent seated breaks
11:45 AM — Local lunch, with options such as:

• Nami Island Kkokko Chuncheon Dakgalbi
• Songwon Makguksu, known for local buckwheat noodles
• Eondeokmaru Gapyeong Pine Nut Tofu House, a lighter senior-friendly option

1:15 PM — Gapyeong Rail Bike experience with advance reservation
3:15 PM — Jathyanggi Pureun Sup Pine Forest for a short, gentle forest-bathing walk
Around 6:00 PM — Return to Seoul

The senior guest may ride while other group members handle the pedaling, or enjoy a nearby rest stop if preferred. The visiting order may change according to the reserved rail-bike time and traffic.

🏘️ Thursday, October 1

Korean Folk Village & Suwon Hwaseong

9:00 AM — Hotel pickup
10:15 AM — Korean Folk Village, using a shortened route and including a seated cultural performance when available
12:45 PM — Lunch choice:

• Traditional Suwon wang-galbi beef ribs
• Korean hanjeongsik set meal

2:30 PM — Hwaseong Haenggung Palace
3:30 PM — Suwon Hwaseong Fortress by tourist trolley or private van, avoiding the long fortress-wall walk
4:45 PM — Café and rest break
7:00 PM — Return to the hotel

🥢 Friday, October 2

Gwangjang Market, Insadong Shopping & ShopingTour

10:00 AM — Hotel pickup
10:30 AM — Gwangjang Market food tasting with comfortable seated stops
12:30 PM — Insadong shopping for Korean crafts, gifts, souvenirs, and traditional products
1:30 PM — Ssamjigil cultural shopping complex
2:15 PM — Traditional Korean tea and dessert break
3:15 PM — Myeongdong shopping
5:30 PM — Relaxed seated farewell dinner at Myeongdong
8:00 PM — Return to the hotel

This will be a van-assisted version of the food tour, with only short walks inside each neighborhood.

💜 Optional Extra Day

BTS Theme Tour

10:00 AM — Hotel pickup
10:30 AM — HYBE headquarters exterior and photo stop
11:30 AM — Yongsan BTS filming-location stop
12:30 PM — Lunch at Yoojung Sikdang
2:00 PM — Former BigHit building and trainee-era neighborhood
3:30 PM — Café Hyuga, located in a former BTS dormitory building
5:00 PM — Olympic Park or another BTS music-video and filming location
6:30 PM — ARMY shopping or dinner
8:00 PM — Return to the hotel

The BTS route can be personalized according to the group’s favorite members, songs, eras, and filming locations.

We will keep every day comfortable, personal, and flexible so that everyone—including your senior family member—can enjoy Korea without feeling rushed or overtired. 🌷

Gaya, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

All You Need. All in One. All Yours.


🇰🇷✨ Welcome to Korea! And Welcome to COZE.

Jet-lagged? Phone not working? Hungry but can’t read the menu?
We get it. And we’ve built a stay just for you.

COZE is where your trip begins with care — not confusion.
We don’t just rent homes. We curate your entire Korean experience around you.

> Think: a home in Korea, powered by local friends who do everything for you.

✈️ Flight: VS5502
📍 Route: London → Incheon International Airport
📅 Arrival: Wednesday, July 29
🕓 Arrival time: 4:15 PM
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Passengers: 6 adults and 3 children

Warm regards,

120363422965145348@g.us.text: Hello. There are two leaks in the small bedroom in the fish house.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

 We will take action as quickly as possible.

We haven't been able to identify the origin of the leaks. We noticed the leak above the floor yesterday and the drip above the bed this morning. 

This is in the fish 9 apartment in the single bedroom attached to the computer room.

Thank you so much for letting us know. We are currently looking into this, and we're currently in talks and arranging for technicians to handle it, so please bear with us. 

Also, we will take care of things like replacing the linens by the end of today

Hello, @135785407856745  🌿

We are currently contacting the contractor responsible for the roof waterproofing work regarding the rainwater leakage.

As it is still early in the morning, there may be a slight delay in their response, and we sincerely appreciate your patience and understanding. 🙏

It appears to be a relatively simple roof drainage issue, and our team expects to have it resolved shortly. We are very sorry for the inconvenience and will continue to keep you updated. 🛠️☔

Gaya, guest care team
